Localization.Description: An ESXi host in a datacenter

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed ESXi host {object.name} from datacenter "{datafield1}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to add ESXi host {object.name} to datacenter "{datafield1}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added ESXi host {object.name} to datacenter "{datafield1}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
